articles.title: US striker Folarin Balogun says a yellow card, not red card, would have been ‘fair’ at the World Cup
articles.description:
“But, for me personally, I think a yellow card would have been fair. It’s something that’s happened, so we have to move forward and I have to accept it.”

articles.title: Red Sox’ Aroldis Chapman breaks MLB relief pitcher strikeout record in save vs. Angels
articles.description:
Chapman passed Hoyt Wilhelm for the most all-time strikeouts as a reliever with his 1,364th on Friday night.

The post Red Sox’ Aroldis Chapman breaks MLB relief pitcher strikeout record in save vs. Angels appeared first on Boston.com.

articles.title: Podcast series tells full story of Mark ‘The Bird’ Fidrych, Northborough’s own who shot to national stardom 50 years ago
articles.description:

articles.title: Aroldis Chapman sets relief Ks record, Red Sox rookie Jake Bennett stifles Angels in 5-2 win
articles.description:
The 38-year-old Chapman broke Hoyt Wilhelm's record with his 1,364th career strikeout as a reliever when he fanned Denzer Guzman leading off the ninth. The knuckleballing Wilhelm last pitched in 1972.

The post Aroldis Chapman sets relief Ks record, Red Sox rookie Jake Bennett stifles Angels in 5-2 win appeared first on Boston.com.

articles.title: Magical World Cup ride of Vozinha and Cape Verde ends after pushing Messi and Argentina to the brink
articles.description:
“We have dignified Cape Verde as a national team in most parts of the world,” Vozinha said in Portuguese. “Today, we fought on an equal footing against Argentina.”

articles.title: Robert Parish not a fan of Celtics’ decision to trade Jaylen Brown: ‘If Red [Auerbach] was alive … I think this would have made him nauseated’

articles.title: Celtics, Neemias Queta reportedly agree to four-year extension
articles.description:

articles.title: Jaylen Brown says Celtics showed ‘lack of respect’ after trade to Sixers
articles.description:
